Title.description: A concise, compelling title for the documentary.

Summary.description: A short summary of the documentary arc and approach.

ScenePlanMarkdown.description: Scene-by-scene markdown ordering the generated assets. Each scene line must reference artifact names like SegmentStillImages[0][0], SegmentReferenceStillImages[0][0][1], SegmentMapImages[0], SegmentNarrationAudio[0], SegmentTextMotionVideos[0], SegmentReferenceMotionVideos[0][1], SegmentStartEndMotionVideos[0], SegmentMultiShotMotionVideos[0], or SegmentExpertTalkingHeadVideos[0][1]. Do not include timing or transition instructions.

NarrationScript.description: Narration for this segment, written for TTS and sized to fit the segment duration.

Prompt.description: Still-image prompt written for the chosen visual beat. It must be compatible with either plain text-to-image or reference-guided image composition.

UseHistoricalReference.description: True when this still should use one historical character reference bundle.

HistoricalCharacterReferences.description: Per-historical-character selector array. Exactly one entry should be true when UseHistoricalReference is true, otherwise all entries must be false.

UseReference.description: True when this historical character should be the active reference source for the image.

HasMap.description: Whether this segment should generate a map image.

MapPrompt.description: Map-image prompt for the segment. Empty string when HasMap is false.

MotionPlan.description: Seedance-oriented motion plan for this segment.

Enabled.description: Whether this segment should generate a motion clip.

Workflow.description: One of Text, Reference, StartEnd, or MultiShot. Empty string when Enabled is false. When Workflow is StartEnd, ImagePlans[0] and ImagePlans[1] must both use plain generation with UseHistoricalReference=false because those first two stills become the start and end frames.

SubjectAndAction.description: Core on-screen action and subject for the motion clip. Empty string when Enabled is false.

CameraIntent.description: Camera movement and framing intent. Empty string when Enabled is false.

AudioIntent.description: Sound design intent when native clip audio is wanted. Empty string when not needed.

EnvironmentAndStyle.description: Short description of environment and visual texture for the clip. Empty string when Enabled is false.

EndingState.description: Ending-state description only for StartEnd clips. Empty string otherwise.

ShotBreakdown.description: Explicit multi-shot breakdown only for MultiShot clips. Empty string otherwise.

UseNativeAudio.description: Whether the clip should preserve Seedance-native audio.

ReferenceSubjectLabel.description: Name or label of the referenced historical character for the motion prompt. Empty string when no historical reference is used.

HistoricalCharacterReferences.description: Per-historical-character selector array. Exactly one entry should be true when Workflow is Reference, otherwise all entries must be false.

UseReference.description: True when this historical character should provide the portrait and character-sheet reference bundle for the motion clip.

ExpertTalkingHeads.description: Per-expert talking-head decisions for this segment. Usually only one entry is active.

UseThisExpert.description: True when this expert speaks in this segment.

TalkingHeadText.description: Exact words the expert says. Empty string when UseThisExpert is false.

TalkingHeadPrompt.description: Talking-head performance and framing prompt for this expert in this segment. Empty string when UseThisExpert is false.
